user.title: Create remote binding
user.description: Bind a Remote-labeled device to a target device or entity.

error.remote_and_target_same: Remote and target cannot be the same device.
error.unsupported_target: That target does not expose a supported control profile.
error.no_supported_target_devices: No supported target devices were found.
error.no_supported_target_entities: No supported target entities were found.

update_binding.name: Update binding
update_binding.description: Create or replace the target for one remote binding.

unbind.name: Unbind
unbind.description: Remove a binding by binding id or remote device id.

resolve_binding.name: Resolve binding
resolve_binding.description: Return the computed target capability profile for a binding.

list_bindings.name: List bindings
list_bindings.description: Return all stored remote bindings for diagnostics.

simulate_remote_event.name: Simulate remote event
simulate_remote_event.description: Fire a normalized remote event through the router for testing.
